    B

    bindClientLocaleSync(boolean) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap.BukkitBootstrap.Builder
    Toggles synchronizing player language from client locale updates.
    bindLoggerLanguage(boolean) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap.BukkitBootstrap.Builder
    Toggles binding the language manager to the logger.

    Builds the bootstrap result and wires requested services.

    BukkitAudienceWrapper - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bukkit
    Wraps a Bukkit CommandSender as a platform-agnostic Audience.
    BukkitAudienceWrapper(CommandSender) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bukkit.BukkitAudienceWrapper
    Wrap a CommandSender as an Audience.
    BukkitAudienceWrapper(JavaPlugin, CommandSender) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bukkit.BukkitAudienceWrapper
    Wrap a CommandSender as an Audience with a specific plugin context.
    BukkitBootstrap - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap
    Bukkit-specific bootstrap helper for wiring MagicUtils in a plugin.
    BukkitBootstrap.Builder - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap
    Builder for wiring MagicUtils services on Bukkit.
    BukkitBootstrap.Result - Record Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap
    Result of bootstrap wiring.
    BukkitBootstrap.RuntimeResult - Record Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap
    Runtime-aware bootstrap result.
    BukkitCommandPlatform - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands
    Bukkit-specific platform hooks for the command engine.
    BukkitCommandPlatform(CommandLogger) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.BukkitCommandPlatform
    Creates a Bukkit platform wrapper.
    BukkitCommandPlatform(JavaPlugin, CommandLogger) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.BukkitCommandPlatform
    Creates a Bukkit platform wrapper.
    BukkitCommandWrapper - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands
    Bukkit command wrapper for integrating custom command logic with Bukkit's command system.
    BukkitConsoleAudience - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bukkit
    Console audience that routes messages through a JUL logger with proper levels.
    BukkitConsoleAudience(Logger, String) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bukkit.BukkitConsoleAudience
    Creates a console audience backed by a JUL logger.
    BukkitExternalPlaceholderEngine - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bukkit
    Placeholder engine that bridges to PlaceholderAPI when available.
    BukkitExternalPlaceholderEngine(JavaPlugin) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bukkit.BukkitExternalPlaceholderEngine
    Creates a PlaceholderAPI bridge for a plugin.
    BukkitMagicUtilsConsumerRegistry - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bukkit
    Tracks Bukkit/Paper plugins that are currently using the shared MagicUtils runtime.
    BukkitMagicUtilsConsumerRegistry.ConsumerInfo - Record Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bukkit
    Immutable snapshot of a shared-runtime consumer.
    BukkitPlaceholderRegistrar - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bukkit
    Registers MagicPlaceholders with Bukkit placeholder backend when available.
    BukkitPlatformLogger - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bukkit
    Lightweight bridge to Bukkit's plugin logger.
    BukkitPlatformLogger(Logger) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bukkit.BukkitPlatformLogger
    Bridge between PlatformLogger and Bukkit's Logger.
    BukkitPlatformProvider - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bukkit
    Platform provider for Bukkit/Paper runtime.
    BukkitPlatformProvider(JavaPlugin) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bukkit.BukkitPlatformProvider
    Create a Bukkit/Paper platform adapter around the given plugin.
    BukkitThreading - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bukkit
    Utility for handling cross-platform threading between standard Bukkit and Folia.

    Integration<T> - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.integrations
    Abstract class for all integrations with external plugins Provides basic logic for availability checking and initialization

    Creates a new integration

    Creates a new integration manager

    isFoliaRuntime() - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bukkit.BukkitThreading
    Checks if the current runtime is Folia (region-based threading).
